home.heroTitle: Discover the Heart of the Silk Road
home.heroSubtitle: Group and private tours across Uzbekistan and Central Asia — crafted by local experts.
home.whyLocalText: Born in Uzbekistan, we know every corner of the Silk Road.
home.whyGuaranteedText: Your tour runs even if you are the only traveler.
home.whyTailoredText: Every itinerary can be customized to your wishes.

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.billedInUsd: All payments are billed in US dollars.
tours.groupIntro: Scheduled small-group departures with guaranteed dates — join fellow travelers on a shared journey.
tours.privateIntro: Your own guide and driver, your own pace — start any day and tailor every detail.
tours.empty: No tours here yet — check back soon.

premium.heroSubtitle: Private journeys through Central Asia, curated for those who travel differently.
premium.conciergeText: A dedicated travel curator available around the clock.
premium.accessText: After-hours visits to monuments, private ateliers and residences.
premium.staysText: Boutique residences and the finest hotels of the Silk Road.

footer.tagline: Your gateway to the Silk Road.

about.title: About TripsFactory
about.text: TripsFactory is a Tashkent-based tour operator specializing in group and private travel across Uzbekistan and Central Asia. Our team of local experts designs journeys that combine iconic Silk Road landmarks with authentic, off-the-beaten-path experiences.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your trip — we reply within 24 hours.
